head.hi: Memorandum on the Mixed Court of Arbitration

div.p: Some of the amendments proposed by the Italian Delegation for Articles 69 and 72 as well as for the provisions of Annexes 6 and 7 of the draft Peace Treaty call for the establishment of a Mixed Court of Arbitration to deal with the matters covered by said Articles and provisions.
The Italian Delegation proposes that an Article be inserted in the Draft Treaty covering this matter.
Such an Article might be worded as proposed in the attached document.Document No. 36 bis (G), infra.
